seo.meta_title: Mount Rinjani Trekking Tours & Guided Hikes | Go2Rinjani
seo.meta_description: Plan your Mount Rinjani trek with Go2Rinjani — certified local guides, crater rim hikes, summit climbs & Segara Anak lake descents. Book your adventure today.

hero.title: Mount Rinjani Treks & Summit Climbs for Every Adventurer
hero.desc: From the forests of Senaru to the summit at 3,726 m — Go2Rinjani offers guided crater rim treks, summit climbs, Segara Anak lake descents, and multi-day expeditions, all led by certified local guides.

items.title: Crater Rim
items.desc: The iconic ridge walk above Segara Anak lake, with sweeping views across Lombok and Bali.

items.title: Summit Climb
items.desc: A guided push to 3,726 m — Lombok's highest point, above the clouds at sunrise.

items.title: Segara Anak
items.desc: We descend into the sacred crater lake and camp beside its turquoise shores and hot springs.

items.title: Sembalun Route
items.desc: A modern savannah trail through open meadows, a few steps from the Sembalun valley village.

about.label: About
about.desc: Go2Rinjani is a certified Mount Rinjani tour operator based in Lombok — part local guide, part conservation advocate, part community. A trusted refuge for trekkers seeking the summit, the thrill of discovery, and the warmth of shared adventure on Indonesia's second-highest volcano.

experience.title: Life on the Rinjani Trail: Raw, Real, Unforgettable
experience.desc: The mountain is never just a mountain — it is that sense of achievement you carry home from it.

items.title: Senaru Trail
items.desc: The trail is lush and full of life, winding through dense rainforest. From dawn until dusk the mountain is yours to explore.

items.title: Crater Camp
items.desc: At Go2Rinjani we have breakfast, hot meals, and rest at camp — anytime, anywhere on the mountain.

items.title: Sembalun Savannah
items.desc: Our trail is vast and captivating, shaped by the traditional Sasak farmland just outside the national park boundary.

agenda.label: Agenda
agenda.title: Be sure not to miss what's on at Go2Rinjani
agenda.desc: Go2Rinjani brings like-minded adventurers where they can trek, connect, and create memories together.

featured_post.title: Trekking Smart on Mount Rinjani: Your Complete Preparation Guide
featured_post.desc: Planning your first Mount Rinjani trek and not sure where to start? Go2Rinjani covers everything — from permits and packing lists to route selection and summit tips.
